original_question:
Given that the graph of the exponential function $f(x)$ passes through the point $(2, 4)$.

(1) Find the analytical expression of the function $f(x)$.
(2) If $f(x - 1) < 1$, find the range of values of $x$.

Present the answer in LaTex format: \boxed{Your answer}
